title: Blog Engine Data Access Layer
description: Build `BlogRepository` supporting creating posts and fetching author posts using SQLAlchemy 2.0.
solution:
class BlogRepo:
    def __init__(self, session): self.s = session
    def create_post(self, user_id, title):
        p = Post(user_id=user_id, title=title)
        self.s.add(p)
        self.s.commit()
        return p
solutionExpl: Implements repository pattern using SQLAlchemy Session.
extensions: Add pagination using offset and limit
